name: playground-scale-free
description: Switch to the Scale-free scenario (Barabási–Albert, N=80, m=2). The degree distribution is power-law, so a few hub nodes attract many connections while leaves have only one or two.

setup.vlmDescription: Debug Playground overlay with the 'Scale-free' pill highlighted. Nodes reads 80, m reads 2. The viewport shows 80 nodes connected by ~157 edges in a force-directed cloud. Visually the structure is distinct from Random: there are a handful of high-degree 'hub' nodes near the center surrounded by lower-degree nodes radiating outward — a power-law degree distribution. No regular lattice or tree pattern.
